correction: The run finalized after the polling command returned; its completed artifact proves it was not a failed process termination. The failure bundle remains immutable but must not be counted as an experiment failure.
memory_field_note: Earlier completed two-epoch source and target training artifacts stored a post-training MPS driver-allocation snapshot in peak_mps_allocated_bytes. It is not a measured peak. Later artifacts set peak to null and record mps_driver_allocated_bytes_after_training explicitly.
